------------ | ------------- | ------------- | -------------
**type** | **string** |  | [default to undefined]
**authToken** | **string** | 3DS authentication token generated by 3DS authentication | [optional] [default to undefined]

**providerTransactionId** | **string** | 3DS transaction identifier generated by the authentication provider | [default to undefined]
**browser** | [**BrowserInformation**](BrowserInformation.md) |  | [optional] [default to undefined]

**version** | **string** | 3DS protocol version used in authentication | [default to undefined]
**cavv** | **string** | Code generated by the card issuer proving that validation was completed | [default to undefined]
**directoryTransactionId** | **string** | Transaction identifier in the 3DS authentication directory | [default to undefined]
